prompt:
# T-081 â€” Risk CRUD + lifecycle

PRD: docs/prd/01-NPD-PRD.md Â§18
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Server Actions for risks CRUD + lifecycle transitions (Open â†’ Mitigated â†’ Closed + reopen) with audit + reason â‰Ą10 chars on transition.

## Implementation contract
1. apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/[productCode]/risks/_actions/create-risk.ts: RBAC risk.write; inserts risks row; emits 'risk.created' outbox.
2. apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/[productCode]/risks/_actions/update-risk.ts: RBAC risk.write; updates fields; transitions allowed Openâ†’Mitigated, Mitigatedâ†’Closed, Closedâ†’Open (reopen), each requires reason â‰Ą10 chars; writes audit_events.
3. apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/[productCode]/risks/_actions/list-risks.ts: returns risks per product_code with bucket counts.
4. Vitest covers reason length, transition validity, RBAC, audit emission.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/[productCode]/risks/_actions/create-risk.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/[productCode]/risks/_actions/update-risk.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/[productCode]/risks/_actions/list-risks.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/[productCode]/risks/_actions/__tests__/risk-actions.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given a risks row in state Open, when updateRisk transitions to Mitigated with reason='ok' (len<10), then it rejects with REASON_TOO_SHORT per Â§18 reason contract
2. Given a non-NPD-Manager calls createRisk, when the action runs, then it rejects with FORBIDDEN per Â§18 RBAC risk.write
3. Given an updateRisk transitions Openâ†’Closed (skipping Mitigated), when the action runs, then it rejects with INVALID_TRANSITION per Â§18 lifecycle Open â†’ Mitigated â†’ Closed

## Test strategy
- RED: __tests__/risk-actions.test.ts (reason length, RBAC, transition validity, audit emit) before actions exist
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test risk-actions'

## Risk red lines
- Do not allow transitions other than Openâ†”Mitigatedâ†”Closed (and reopen Closedâ†’Open)
- Do not bypass audit_events emission
- Do not allow reason shorter than 10 chars on lifecycle transitions
